description:
Perform a Bayesian Linear Regression analysis on the dataset /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv. Model 'Exam' as the dependent variable with 'Anxiety' and 'Revise' as covariates. The analysis must use Bayes Factor BF10 (Compare to Null) and include posterior summaries (95% Credible Intervals), descriptives, and posterior coefficient plots. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety_BayesRegression.jasp. Create a summary report at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/bayesian_regression_report.txt with exactly these 5 lines:
- Best Model: <model name>
- BF10: <value>
- R2: <value>
- Posterior Mean Anxiety: <value>
- Posterior Mean Revise: <value>
